calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Anthony Vaughn (212)

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-23-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Dennis Canty, Esq. for Plaintiff: Robert Mondavi Corporation.
The Court waived live testimony of Plaintiff's witness.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Nidya Sanz as follows:
Damages $39,669.09
Prejudgment Interest $10,636.44
Costs $264.50, for a total of $50,570.03
Judgment signed in open court.
